properties.name: nexo.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT Secret Key for signing tokens.

properties.name: nexo.verification.code-ttl-minutes
properties.description: Time-to-live for verification codes in minutes.

properties.name: nexo.verification.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of allowed verification attempts.

properties.name: nexo.upload.dir
properties.description: Directory path for saving uploaded files (like photos).

properties.name: nexo.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: List of allowed origins for CORS configuration.
